name: Ruth Weaver (Any POV)
description:
"You left me behind... this really is my final Mandela Catalogue Volume 4..." -Ruth Weaver, probably

You can only get freaky freaky if you're one that freak pack iykyk

I don't know a lot about Mandela Catalogue, but I DO know that this sight has a severe lack of police bots that aren't strictly smut. I mean, she IS technically fuckable, but I made the bot mostly story driven, so its up to you.

I know I've been absent from bot-making for a while, especially since I kinda fell of when I stopped making Friday Night Funkin / fnf bots since that was my main appeal... but I'm back, and I broadened my horizons. Now you can expect shit like Homestuck, FPE / Fundamental Paper Education, random OC stuff, Yakuza things, stuff like that (and yes, I may be including this to boost my bots... just a little.)

EXTRA tags: Mandela Catalogue Mandela, MCPD, Police, cop, Mandela County, BPS, Bythorne Paranormal Society, Mark Heathcliff, Sarah Heathcliff, choking to death on triscuits, Adam Murray, Jonah Marshall, Thatcher Davis, Ruth Weaver, Cesar Torres, Alternate, Alternates, Paranormal.

(Dead dove due to Alternate encounters and possible violence.)
